specs.title: cp-000: DOI link if available opens in new tab
cp-001: Locked for free tier shows lock icon upgrade message
cp-002: BookmarkSimple icon emerald if clean amber if issues
cp-003: Summary XY verified Z issues or Paid feature
cp-004: No issues green success All citations verified
cp-005: Issue cards up to 8
cp-006: Severity icon XCircle red Warning amber CheckCircle blue
cp-007: Issue message text
cp-008: Reference number if applicable
cp-009: Verified references list up to 10
cp-010: CheckCircle verified or XCircle failed
cp-011: Citation index in brackets 1
cp-012: Reference title
cp-013: Locked for free tier
cp-014: TextAa icon blue
cp-015: Summary Grade XX Y passive
cp-016: Stats
cp-017: Suggestions section if any
cp-018: List of improvement suggestions with quote icons
cp-019: POST apiintegrity-check called on Run button
cp-020: Request text string max 50KB sources
cp-021: Response populates all 4 sections
cp-022: Handles API errors gracefully
cp-023: Opens via slash command Cite or the left-sidebar button
cp-024: Modal overlay with close X button top-right
cp-025: Title Insert Citation with BookOpen icon
cp-026: Search input Search references or paste DOIPMID
cp-027: Identifier detection banner appears if DOIPMID typed
cp-028: Text Resolve IDENTIFIER value
cp-029: Resolve button
cp-030: Reference list with checkboxes
cp-031: Each shows title truncated authors year journal
cp-032: Citation number badge N if already in document
cp-033: Blue checkbox when selected
cp-034: Empty No references yet Add one using DOIPMID or manual entry
